narrative:
Pedro Vite is an attacking midfield player for Ecuador, currently boasting an overall rating of 7.19/10. This impressive score places him within the top 4% of attacking midfields at this tournament. His rating range of 6.84–7.54 reflects the sample size of matches contributing to his current evaluation.

Vite demonstrates a strong creative presence, evidenced by his 0.25 assists per 90 minutes and 2.25 key passes per 90 minutes at this World Cup. He also contributes significantly defensively, averaging 3.75 tackles and 1.5 interceptions per 90 minutes. However, his direct goal threat appears limited with only 0.034 expected goals per 90 minutes and 1.0 shots per 90 minutes.

Vite serves as a vital creative hub and defensive workhorse for Ecuador, operating across the full 360 minutes played in this World Cup. Scouts should continue to observe his excellent work rate and playmaking ability. Fans will be keen to see if he can translate his 0.211 expected assists per 90 minutes into more decisive attacking actions.
